Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class SocialCustomerServiceSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SocialCustomerServiceSettings2
public class SocialCustomerServiceSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for SocialCustomerServiceSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SocialCustomerServiceSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CaseSubjectOption" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAllFbResponseAccountsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsInboundProcessingConcurrencyEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSocialApprovalsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSocialCaseAssignmentRulesEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSocialCustomerServiceEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSocialPersonaHistoryTrackingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSocialPostHistoryTrackingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSocialReceiveParentPostEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SocialCustomerServiceSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
